description_long: This is a small, stylized blue airplane with a red nose cone and yellow accents on the wingtips and tail. The fuselage is compact and rounded, with a single propeller at the front and a simple, cartoon-like design. The wings are straight and positioned low on the body, extending outward with no visible dihedral or winglets. The tail section features a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, all with yellow tips. The cockpit is located at the front of the fuselage and appears to be a single-seat, open configuration. The airplane is depicted in front of a painted scenic backdrop of a sky with clouds and a landscape below.
description: A small, cartoon-style blue airplane with red and yellow accents, featuring a single propeller and a simple, rounded design. It is shown against a painted sky and landscape backdrop.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue airplane's red nose, yellow-tipped wings, and single propeller, with the cockpit visible at the front.
description_view_1: Angled rear-side view where the airplane is mostly obscured by the scenic backdrop, with only a hint of the tail visible.
description_view_2: Rear-side view with the airplane not visible, only the painted sky and landscape are seen.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the airplane's yellow-tipped tail and blue fuselage, with the propeller and cockpit facing away.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with straight wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a visible propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, open single-seat cockpit at the front of the fuselage.
